name: Sharpshooter
flavor: High Noon — picks you off from the ridgeline. Reskin of the Sniper; the Rifle die behaves like the Sniper die.

specialAction.name: Buffalo Rifle
specialAction.summary: Make an Attack on a valid target and add the Rifle die to the Attack dice. Its good faces add hits; on a kicking-recoil face you take Lead (+2 or +1). The Rifle die re-rolls like the others but can never be modified.

effects.text: Add the Rifle die (Sniper-die analog) to the Attack pool.
Recoil faces add +2 or +1 Lead to the Sharpshooter.

specialAbility.summary: For each Lightning, place 1 Drop token on the target after your Attack (lowering its Cover).
